job_title: Software Quality Engineer, Vision Products Software
job_description:
• Minimum QualificationsBachelor’s degree in computer science or related field, or equivalent work experience.
• 3 or more years experience testing applications.
• Strong hands on experience with QA methodologies, or prior QA experience.
• Confirmed bug detection and bug isolation skills.
• Outstanding communication skills, for collaborating across many participating teams.
• Analytical, disciplined and creative problem solver committed to driving quality forward.
• Ability to adapt in a high-paced and informal environment.
• Act as a strong advocate for quality in the product development process for software engineering.
